title: cremastra aphylla
intro: Cremastra aphylla, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid native to East Asia. Traditionally, the plant is used in medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cremastra aphylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
